name: veridichain
description: Decentralized Credential Verification on QIE Blockchain

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd contracts && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install
scripts.deploy:testnet: cd contracts && npx hardhat run scripts/deploy.js --network qie_testnet
scripts.deploy:local: cd contracts && npx hardhat run scripts/deploy.js --network localhost

author: VeridiChain
